meanings.definition: frequent and watery bowel movements; can be a symptom of infection or food poisoning or colitis or a gastrointestinal tumor

examples: the flexibility and looseness of the materials from which mythology is made

meanings.definition: a lack of strict accuracy; laxity of practice
examples: misunderstandings can often be traced to a looseness of expression

meanings.definition: the quality of movability by virtue of being free from attachment or other restraints

examples: there was too much play in the steering wheel
loosen the tension on a rope
The government relaxed the curfew after most of the rebels were caught
The rules relaxed after the new director arrived

meanings.definition: disentangle and raise the fibers of
become loose or looser or less tight
